title: REST API Request-Response Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the path of a client request through the layers of a full stack application to the REST API and back with a response.
relationships: Client sends an HTTP request (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) to a specific API endpoint
REST API receives the request, parses it, and routes it to the correct handler
Server-side logic executes the necessary business operations (e.g., data processing, validation)
Logic interacts with the Database to perform CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
API formats the result into a JSON/XML response and sends an HTTP status code back to the Client
